rationale: The skill invokes the firecrawl CLI (or npx firecrawl) to scrape arbitrary user-supplied URLs, so it spawns the firecrawl binary and connects to api.firecrawl.dev plus any third-party host the user wants scraped (effectively unrestricted). Output is written to ./.firecrawl/ files per the documented naming convention, and the tips suggest reading those files back with grep/head. No deletions are described.
